items.name_en: Code Change Chip
items.name_cn:
Code Change Chip
This Bella Bucket Bag from the Flight Mode collection features classic perforated leather rendered in a seasonal gradient effect, with the lining continuing the fresh tones of the bag body. A detachable coin pouch ensures tidy storage, making it a modern choice for beyond winter.
22 x 14 x 16 cm
(H x W x D)
Perforated Calfskin
Calfskin Trim
Microfiber Lining
Metal Hardware
Round Coin Pouch
Metal Studs
Fits short wallet, smartphone, keys, and earphones
Strap: Detachable, Adjustable
Half-length: 50.0 cm
Max length: 56.0 cm
Handle: Single handle, detachable

items.name_en: Model: M46828 【Croissant MM】The Croissant bag is introduced in the 2024 Early Spring collection, resembling the Pea Bag from 20 years ago. It is a two-piece set featuring a curved Pea Bag, a crossbody bag, and a shoulder bag. A small coin purse can also serve as an extra pocket. The Monogram Zjh classic canvas adds a more lively and vivid feel. The pairing is almost perfect!

The Monogram Zjh classic canvas adds a more lively and vivid feel. The pairing is almost perfect!
Size: 21 X 7 X 5

items.name_en: Model: M57099, Top-tier replica, Noe Purse, Ruffled Bucket Bag. A highly recommended style this year. It's been compared to the new LV bucket bag—sweet and cute! Beautiful design, good capacity, versatile styling. Can be carried by hand or worn over the shoulder with the strap. Looks great on anyone, guaranteed to turn heads on the street or on a date. A beauty you can't refuse!

items.name_en: [Chip Version] Model: M50202, M41436 Coffee Check, M50202 Monogram Small Hobo. A super mini cute bag, a small hobo in the vintage style. If you want to go for a retro look, this is the right choice. It looks great on. The monogram hobo is rare, and it holds a lot. Capacity is super 👍🏻. Dimensions: 23 × 13 × 14 cm.

items.name_en: [Chip Version] Model: M83480 Canoé Handbag. Crafted from Monogram canvas, it combines the Noé and Cannes bags, featuring a drawstring from the former and a molded bottom from the latter, blending trendy style with practicality. The woven chain and leather shoulder straps are detachable for multiple carrying styles. 14×20.5×14cm

items.name_en: Model: M47132. The Alma backpack makes a striking appearance at the 2024 Spring/Summer Women's show, adding a fashionable new piece to the Alma collection. Classic Monogram canvas paired with various Alma handbag elements, including rounded top handles, dazzling engraved lock, and key pouch. Removable shoulder strap offers versatile carrying options. 15.0 x 20.0 x 10.0 cm (L x H x W)

items.name_en: Model: M47123 Pochette Tirette Handbag, crafted in Monogram canvas for a relaxed silhouette, opening the Louis Vuitton 2024 Spring-Summer show with a bold attitude. Leather trim highlights the side's pointed silhouette reminiscent of the brand's zipper pull, while the dazzling lock and detachable, adjustable leather shoulder strap add detail. 22 x 12 x 5.5 cm (Length x Height x Width)

items.name_en: [Size Change Chip Version] Model: M12099 Small This piece 🔥 double-sided use Legendary Neverfull BB: always meets your tote needs. Spacious yet not bulky, structured yet soft, suitable for home or travel. Tighten side ties to instantly transform into a chic city bag. Loosen ties to become a unique and practical handbag. Long leather handle is suitable for shoulder or arm carry. Shown here in Damier Azur canvas.

items.name_cn:
New Arrival 🅰️🅰️
CELINE New Arrival. TRIOMPHE CANVAS logo print
Flip top with decorative TRIOMPHE lock, snap closure, 1 main compartment, 1 flat pocket, detachable chain strap, and adjustable leather shoulder strap. Multiple carrying styles. Easily fits daily essentials like phone, lipstick, and keys. Three-in-one design, definitely a crowd favorite 🫶🏻 Perfect for all occasions!
Style: 10L972 Rice Brown
Size: 20.5x11x4 (with original packaging)

items.name_en: Small Size 18cm "High-end Quality Customization" 🚩🚩🚩 Exclusive Custom Release, Upgraded New OHANEL 24K Autumn/Winter New Makeup Bag 🆕 The makeup bag is a popular style favored by Chanel. Elegant and noble, it can serve as a vintage makeup box for various collections. The body features a double C logo, full of vintage retro style, and the capacity is huge. The shape is structured and suitable for various occasions. It can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody! It also features an automatic lock, all-steel 14k pale gold buckle, and imported sheepskin~ soft to the touch and worth buying, looking noble everywhere! Official website sync: 12.5 X 18 X 6.5 cm

items.name_en: Vintage Crossbody Bag🎉🎉🎉1BD645🎉🎉
items.name_cn:
Vintage Crossbody Bag🎉🎉🎉1BD645🎉🎉
This Vintage chain quilted hobo bag design is amazing👏👏.
Pure handcrafted nylon quilted design, can be worn on one shoulder or crossbody. Imported black and gold chain is a classic Vintage touch😘😘. Simple and elegant, large capacity👍. Very trendy and versatile. Whether casual or formal, it has a steady temperament. Grab one now🙊. Love this Vintage hobo bag😘😘.
25x21x8cm
